'''âch-h-y''' ('''shachahay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nay|nay]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-h-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nay|nay]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âch-h-y
|-
! Lemma
| shachahay
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichahay|thichahay]] || [[word:jichahay|jichahay]] || [[word:shichahay|shichahay]] || [[word:kichahay|kichahay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchahay|thuthuchahay]] || [[word:jujuchahay|jujuchahay]] || [[word:shushuchahay|shushuchahay]] || [[word:kukuchahay|kukuchahay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchahay|thuchahay]] || [[word:juchahay|juchahay]] || [[word:shuchahay|shuchahay]] || [[word:kuchahay|kuchahay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchahay|thuchahay]] || [[word:juchahay|juchahay]] || [[word:shuchahay|shuchahay]] || [[word:kuchahay|kuchahay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechahay|thechahay]] || [[word:jechahay|jechahay]] || [[word:shechahay|shechahay]] || [[word:kechahay|kechahay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochahay|thothochahay]] || [[word:jojochahay|jojochahay]] || [[word:shoshochahay|shoshochahay]] || [[word:kokochahay|kokochahay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochahay|thochahay]] || [[word:jochahay|jochahay]] || [[word:shochahay|shochahay]] || [[word:kochahay|kochahay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochahay|thochahay]] || [[word:jochahay|jochahay]] || [[word:shochahay|shochahay]] || [[word:kochahay|kochahay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠchahay|thĂŠchahay]] || [[word:jĂŠchahay|jĂŠchahay]] || [[word:shĂŠchahay|shĂŠchahay]] || [[word:kĂŠchahay|kĂŠchahay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachahay|thathachahay]] || [[word:jajachahay|jajachahay]] || [[word:shashachahay|shashachahay]] || [[word:kakachahay|kakachahay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachahay|thachahay]] || [[word:jachahay|jachahay]] || [[word:shachahay|shachahay]] || [[word:kachahay|kachahay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachahay|thachahay]] || [[word:jachahay|jachahay]] || [[word:shachahay|shachahay]] || [[word:kachahay|kachahay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachahay|shachahay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachahay|goshachahay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachahay|gokishachahay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachahaynĂŒ|shachahaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachahaynknĂŒ|goshachahaynknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachahaynĂŒ|gokishachahaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachahayshĂ«|shachahayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachahaynkshĂ«|goshachahaynkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachahayshĂ«|gokishachahayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachahayro|shachahayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachahaynkro|goshachahaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachahayro|gokishachahayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachahaymu|shachahaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachahaynkmu|goshachahaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachahaymu|gokishachahaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachahaysher|shachahaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachahaynksher|goshachahaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachahaysher|gokishachahaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachahayng|shachahayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachahaynkng|goshachahaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachahayng|gokishachahayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachahaya|shachahaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachahaynkya|goshachahaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachahaya|gokishachahaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachahayam|shachahayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachahaynkyam|goshachahaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachahayam|gokishachahayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachahaynĂŒshĂ«|shachahaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachahaynknĂŒshĂ«|goshachahaynknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachahaynĂŒshĂ«|gokishachahaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachahaynĂŒro|shachahaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachahaynknĂŒro|goshachahaynknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachahaynĂŒro|gokishachahaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachahaynĂŒmu|shachahaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachahaynknĂŒmu|goshachahaynknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachahaynĂŒmu|gokishachahaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachahayshĂ«nĂŒ|shachahayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachahaynkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshachahaynkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachahayshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishachahayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachahayshĂ«ro|shachahayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachahaynkshĂ«ro|goshachahaynkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachahayshĂ«ro|gokishachahayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachahayshĂ«mu|shachahayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachahaynkshĂ«mu|goshachahaynkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachahayshĂ«mu|gokishachahayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachahayronĂŒ|shachahayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachahaynkronĂŒ|goshachahaynkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachahayronĂŒ|gokishachahayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachahayroshĂ«|shachahayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachahaynkroshĂ«|goshachahaynkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachahayroshĂ«|gokishachahayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachahayromu|shachahayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachahaynkromu|goshachahaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachahayromu|gokishachahayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachahaymunĂŒ|shachahaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachahaynkmunĂŒ|goshachahaynkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachahaymunĂŒ|gokishachahaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachahaymushĂ«|shachahaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachahaynkmushĂ«|goshachahaynkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachahaymushĂ«|gokishachahaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachahaymuro|shachahaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachahaynkmuro|goshachahaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachahaymuro|gokishachahaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
